title: Riptide trident
description: changes every trident with the riptide enchantment to a dark prismarine* version
body:
Vanilla, no mods needed

Changes the staff part of every with riptide(any level) enchanted trident to a dark prismarine* color both in the inventory and in the players hand (first and third person)

high contrast version here: https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/riptide-trident-high-contrast

Feel free to contact me for other color/model ideas

    
  *not exactly the colors of dark prismarine because they are too similar to the normal texture
